Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar May-21-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: O/C, ADVANCED TO 5-20-02.

Osc/Pi
Off Calendar May-20-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCE: JAN CHATTEN-BROWN, (310)474-7793 FOR PLTF; CHRISTIANA TIEDEMANN (510)622-2218 FOR DEFT; DOROTHY BERRY (213)485-4516 FOR REAL PARTY IN INTEREST CITY OF LOS ANGELES.
RULING: ARGUED, WRIT OF MANDATE IS GRANTED. PETITIONER TO PREPARE PROPOSED FINDINGS AND JUDGMENT BASED ON COURT'S DECISION. COUNSEL TO APPROVE AS TO FORM OR TO WRITE TO COURT OF ANY DISAGREEMENT AS TO FORM OF JUDGMENT.

Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Mar-12-2002 Continued To May-21-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: CONTINUED TO 5/21/02 PER STIP & ORDER.

Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Jan-17-2002 Continued To Mar-12-02 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Jan Chatten-Brown, Esq. 310/474-7793 for petitioners & moving parties; Christiana Tiedemann, Deputy Atty General 510/622-2218 for respondent & opposing party California Coastal Commission; Keith Pritsker, Esq. 213/485-6422 & Dorothy Berry, Esq. 213/485-4516 for Real Party In Interest City of Los Angeles.
RULING: The Court announced its tentative ruling as follows: Motion for preliminary injunction treated as motion for a stay and granted pursuant to CCP 1094.5(g) Administrative record necessary to evaluate claims. Stay granted as to construction of Loffelstein Walls and any dredging or damming of canal otherwise project can proceed. Court exercised its discretion pursuant to Venice Canals vs. Superior Court Cal.App.3d 675 not to require bond. Hearing required re timing of lodging of administrative record. Alternative writ to show cause why decision of coastal commission should not be set aside granted.
Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling. Order signed in open court. The Court sets the following expedited schedule: petitioner to provide listing of documents for administrative record to respondent by 01/24; respondent to prepare administrative record/certified record by 02/15; opening brief due 02/22; reply brief due 03/06; hearing (on writ) set for 03/12 at 3:30pm. Petitioner to prepare scheduling order and alternative writ.
